sketches.mechanism: Ownership move semantics: passing a non-Copy value transfers ownership, and any later use is rejected at compile time.
sketches.resonance: What is truly given cannot also remain in the giver's hands.

sketches.mechanism: A weak reference does not retain its object and is automatically set to nil when the last strong reference leaves scope; force-unwrapping it then traps.
sketches.resonance: Memory alone cannot keep a body here, and insisting on presence breaks the world.

sketches.mechanism: The temporal dead zone for let bindings: the name is in scope before initialization, but reading it before its declaration throws a ReferenceError.
sketches.resonance: A name can already belong to a place and still be impossible to touch before its time.
